title: Gun Metal Blu: Tactical Intervention
description: A Gunpack for Vic's Point  Blank Made by Larsh512.
body:
# Gun Metal Blu
## What is GMB?
A gunpack for Vic's PointBlank, To install, make a "pointblank" folder inside your mc folder, and put the latest zip file inside, It should be ".minecraft/pointblank/gmb_(version number).zip".
## What does this add?
Some guns for the VPB mod, Which i made for fun, and to be customizable and fun to use.

_**Description Last updated on 17-5-2026 (DD-MM-YYYY)**_
